activities_projects.title: Oersted's Experiment – Compass Deflection
activities_projects.objective: Observe that electric current produces magnetic field
steps: Set up circuit with wire between two points
Place compass near the wire horizontally
Reverse current direction and note change
activities_projects.evaluation: Observation notes and diagram of deflection (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Magnetic Field Lines Around Straight Wire
activities_projects.objective: Visualize circular magnetic field around current-carrying wire
steps: Place wire vertically through hole in cardboard
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes circular field lines and direction
activities_projects.evaluation: Sketch accuracy and direction labeling (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Right-Hand Thumb Rule Practice
activities_projects.objective: Apply rule to find magnetic field direction
steps: Draw 5 diagrams of straight wire with current direction
Use thumb for current, fingers for field curls
Mark field direction at different points
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Masters right-hand thumb rule for straight conductor

activities_projects.title: Simple Electromagnet Making
steps: Wind wire tightly around nail (20-30 turns)
activities_projects.evaluation: Number of clips picked and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Magnetic Field of Circular Loop
steps: Form a single loop with wire
Pass current and place compass near loop

activities_projects.title: Force on Current-Carrying Wire Demo
activities_projects.objective: See force due to magnetic field on conductor
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands force perpendicular to current and field

activities_projects.title: Fleming's Left-Hand Rule Application
steps: Draw 5 scenarios of wire in magnetic field with current
Verify with actual demo if possible

activities_projects.title: Simple Electric Motor Model
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns conversion of electrical to mechanical energy
activities_projects.evaluation: Model rotation and basic explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Domestic Wiring Safety Poster
activities_projects.objective: Identify safety features in household circuits
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands protection from shocks and overloads
activities_projects.evaluation: Diagram accuracy and rules listed (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Electromagnet Uses in Daily Life Survey
steps: List 8 devices using electromagnets (crane, bell, speaker, MRI)
